title: Indie developers got tired of waiting for a new Star Fox, so they’re making their own

title: Show HN: Bash4LLM+ – A lightweight, dependency-free Bash wrapper for LLM APIs
summary: Bash4LLM is a single-file Bash wrapper for interacting with LLMs from the terminal.  I created it because I wanted something simple that worked without installing Python, Node, or any other runtime.It uses only Bash, curl, and jq. You can send prompts, start a small chat, process files line by line, stream output, and save session metadata in JSON format.I tried to make it safe and predictable: no use of the system /tmp, no use of eval.
